2604.23413.title: Beyond Local vs. External: A Game-Theoretic Framework for Trustworthy Knowledge Acquisition
2604.23413.paper_summary: Cloud-hosted Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unmatched reasoning capabilities and dynamic knowledge, yet submitting raw queries to these external services risks exposing sensitive user intent. Conversely, relying exclusively on trusted local models preserves privacy but often compromises answer quality due to limited parameter scale and knowledge. To resolve this dilemma, we propose Game-theoretic Trustworthy Knowledge Acquisition (GTKA), a framework that formulates the trade-off between knowledge utility and privacy as a strategic game. GTKA consists of three components: (i) a privacy-aware sub-query generator that decomposes sensitive intent into generalized, low-risk fragments; (ii) an adversarial reconstruction attacker that attempts to infer the original query from these fragments, providing adaptive leakage signals; and (iii) a trusted local integrator that synthesizes external responses within a secure boundary. By training the generator and attacker in an alternating adversarial manner, GTKA optimizes the sub-query generation policy to maximize knowledge acquisition accuracy while minimizing the reconstructability of the original sensitive intent. To validate our approach, we construct two sensitive-domain benchmarks in the biomedical and legal fields. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GTKA significantly reduces intent leakage compared to state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining high-fidelity answer quality.
2604.23413.paper_summary_zh: 雲端托管的大型語言模型（LLMs）提供無與倫比的推理能力和動態知識，但向這些外部服務提交原始查詢會冒著暴露敏感用戶意圖的風險。相反，完全依賴受信的本地模型雖然能夠保護隱私，但由於參數規模和知識的限制，往往會妥協答案質量。為了解決這一困境，我們提出了博弈論的可信知識獲取（GTKA）框架，將知識效用與隱私之間的權衡表述為一個策略性遊戲。GTKA 由三個組件組成：（i）一個隱私意識的子查詢生成器，將敏感意圖分解為一般化的低風險片段；（ii）一個對抗性重建攻擊者，試圖從這些片段推斷原始查詢，提供自適應的洩漏信號；以及（iii）一個可信的本地整合器，在安全邊界內合成外部響應。通過以交替對抗的方式訓練生成器和攻擊者，GTKA 優化了子查詢生成策略，以最大化知識獲取的準確性，同時最小化原始敏感意圖的可重建性。為了驗證我們的方法，我們在生物醫學和法律領域構建了兩個敏感領域基準。廣泛的實驗表明，與最先進的基準相比，GTKA 顯著降低了意圖洩漏，同時保持了高保真度的答案質量。
2604.23413.author: Rujing Yao et.al.
2604.23413.authors: Rujing Yao, Yufei Shi, Yang Wu, Ang Li, Zhuoren Jiang, XiaoFeng Wang, Haixu Tang, Xiaozhong Liu
